steps.title: Coordinate two objects
steps.content: The researchers studied connections between two things: the physical location in which a social media post was created and the post's content. The word "and" joins those two objects of "between."

steps.title: Remove unnecessary commas
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C incorrectly put a comma before "and" even though only two objects are joined. Choice D adds a comma after "content," separating the object from the phrase. The remaining choice coordinates the two objects cleanly. The answer is B.
